## Summary

Brief description of changes and motivation.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] All tests pass locally (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] Ruff and mypy pass (`ruff check`, `mypy veripatch`)
- [ ] Lua GUI passes luacheck (`luacheck gui/`)
- [ ] Only official, verified update sources are used (see [SOURCE_POLICY.md](docs/SOURCE_POLICY.md))
- [ ] Audit logging added for privileged or validation actions where applicable
- [ ] README or docs updated if needed

## Source validation

Confirm that no third-party or unofficial update channels were introduced.
